caption:
Have you tried Warabi Mochi? How was it? I found a truly special one for you, with real flowers, and it’s located in a 100-year-old house 😍 
I’ve also created a map featuring my favorite places, complete with photos and dish recommendations for each restaurant 🥰 You can find the link in my bio.
Location: Kyoto, at 麓寿庵 Rokujuan.
